channel.title: Adiutor Update
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description:
What's New in v1.2.1

✨ Changes & Improvements

  • Improved task flow: completed tasks in the To-Do card now move seamlessly to the bottom of the list for a cleaner, less distracting experience.

‼️ Bug Fixes

  • Includes minor bug fixes and stability improvements.

Feedback

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome through GitHub Issues.

Thank you for trying Adiutor.
